functions.name: cad_help
functions.description: CAD rendering pipeline assistant. Answers questions about environment setup, configuration, next steps, materials, cameras, rendering, AI enhancement, troubleshooting, file structure, status, and cross-LLM integration. Supports 15 intents with natural language input.

query.description: Natural language question about the CAD pipeline. Examples: 'what should I do next?', 'check my environment', 'what materials are available?', 'how to render?'

functions.name: cad_spec
functions.description: Generate structured CAD_SPEC.md from a Markdown design document. Extracts 9 categories: parameters, tolerances, fasteners, connection matrix, BOM tree, assembly pose, visual IDs, render plan, completeness report.

file.description: Path to the design document (.md file)

config.description: Path to JSON config file with subsystem mapping

force.description: Force regeneration, ignoring MD5 cache (default: false)

all.description: Process all subsystems defined in config (default: false)

functions.name: bom_parse
functions.description: Parse BOM (Bill of Materials) tables from a Markdown design document. Returns part tree with assembly hierarchy, make/buy flags, and cost breakdown.

file.description: Path to the design document (.md file)

format.description: Output format: tree (default), json, or summary

functions.name: cad_enhance
functions.description: Enhance a Blender-rendered PNG to photorealistic JPG via Gemini AI. Geometry is locked — only surface materials change. Uses prompt templates: prompt_enhance.txt (V1-V3), prompt_exploded.txt (V4), prompt_ortho.txt (V5).

input_image.description: Path to Blender-generated PNG file (e.g., V1_front_iso.png)

prompt.description: Enhancement prompt. Fill template from templates/prompt_*.txt with material descriptions from render_config.json

output_dir.description: Output directory for the enhanced JPG (optional)
